title: Hyogo Medical Guide
heroDescription: Find clinics across Hyogo Prefecture by specialty and area. The data provided here was obtained from JICA; if you notice any errors, please inform us using the form at the bottom of the page.
noFacilitiesDesc: We couldn't find any hospitals or clinics matching your current active filters. Please try adjusting your criteria.
contributeTitle: Know a missing hospital or clinic?
contributeDescription: If you know of a hospital or clinic in Hyogo Prefecture that isn't listed here, help us add it! Your contribution helps the community find the care they need.
